description: In a case involving confidential information, the parties agree to a stipulated protective order to govern the handling of sensitive documents. An associate needs to draft it.

nodes.task_description: Select the firm's or court's model protective order template.

expected_outcome.value: Agent starts with a standard, approved form.

nodes.task_description: Define the different tiers of confidentiality (e.g., 'Confidential', 'Attorneys' Eyes Only').

expected_outcome.value: Agent defines the rules for who can see what information.

nodes.task_description: Circulate the draft to opposing counsel for their review and comment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent shares the draft to get agreement from the other side.
